---
name: ♿ Accessibility Issue
about: Report accessibility barriers or suggest accessibility improvements
title: '[A11Y] '
labels: ['accessibility', 'needs-review', 'inclusive-design']
assignees: ''
---

## ♿ Accessibility Issue Summary
**Brief description of the accessibility barrier:**

## 🚧 Accessibility Barrier
**What accessibility issue are you experiencing?**

**Barrier Type:**
- [ ] 👁️ Visual accessibility (blindness, low vision)
- [ ] 👂 Auditory accessibility (deafness, hard of hearing)
- [ ] 🖱️ Motor accessibility (limited mobility, motor impairments)
- [ ] 🧠 Cognitive accessibility (learning disabilities, memory issues)
- [ ] 🗣️ Speech accessibility (speech impairments)
- [ ] 🌐 Language accessibility (non-native speakers, literacy levels)
- [ ] 🔧 Technology accessibility (assistive technology compatibility)

**Specific Issues:**
- [ ] 🖱️ Cannot navigate with keyboard only
- [ ] 📖 Screen reader cannot access content
- [ ] 🎨 Insufficient color contrast
- [ ] 📝 Missing alternative text for images
- [ ] 🎵 No captions for audio/video content
- [ ] 🔍 Text too small to read
- [ ] ⚡ Content flashes/causes seizures
- [ ] 🎯 Cannot focus on interactive elements
- [ ] 📱 Not responsive on assistive devices
- [ ] 🗣️ No audio descriptions for visual content

## 🎯 Affected Features
**Which parts of TahitiSpeak are affected?**

**Learning Features:**
- [ ] 🎓 Lesson navigation
- [ ] 🗣️ Pronunciation practice
- [ ] 📝 Writing exercises
- [ ] 🎵 Audio playback controls
- [ ] 📊 Progress tracking
- [ ] 🎯 Quiz/assessment tools
- [ ] 📚 Vocabulary practice
- [ ] 🎭 Cultural content

**Platform Features:**
- [ ] 🔐 Login/registration
- [ ] ⚙️ Settings/preferences
- [ ] 👥 Community features
- [ ] 🔍 Search functionality
- [ ] 📱 Mobile app navigation
- [ ] 💬 Messaging/chat
- [ ] 📈 Dashboard/analytics
- [ ] 💳 Payment/subscription

## 🛠️ Assistive Technology
**What assistive technology are you using?**

**Screen Readers:**
- [ ] 🍎 VoiceOver (iOS/macOS)
- [ ] 🪟 NVDA (Windows)
- [ ] 🪟 JAWS (Windows)
- [ ] 🐧 Orca (Linux)
- [ ] 🌐 Browser built-in screen reader

**Other Assistive Technology:**
- [ ] 🖱️ Switch navigation
- [ ] 👁️ Eye tracking
- [ ] 🗣️ Voice control
- [ ] 🔍 Screen magnification
- [ ] ⌨️ Alternative keyboards
- [ ] 🖱️ Alternative pointing devices
- [ ] 🎧 Hearing aids/cochlear implants

**Technology Details:**
- Device: [e.g. iPhone with VoiceOver, Windows PC with NVDA]
- Software version: [e.g. VoiceOver iOS 16.5, NVDA 2023.2]
- Browser: [e.g. Safari, Chrome, Firefox]
- Settings: [Any specific accessibility settings enabled]

## 🔄 Steps to Reproduce
**How can we reproduce this accessibility issue?**

1. Enable [specific assistive technology]
2. Navigate to [specific page/feature]
3. Attempt to [specific action]
4. Observe [accessibility barrier]

**Specific Navigation:**
- Keyboard navigation path: [e.g. Tab through lesson controls]
- Screen reader commands used: [e.g. Heading navigation, Link list]
- Voice commands attempted: [If using voice control]

## ✅ Expected Accessible Behavior
**What should happen for this to be accessible?**

**Accessibility Standards:**
- [ ] WCAG 2.1 AA compliance
- [ ] Keyboard navigation support
- [ ] Screen reader compatibility
- [ ] Proper focus management
- [ ] Sufficient color contrast (4.5:1)
- [ ] Alternative text for images
- [ ] Captions for audio content
- [ ] Descriptive link text
- [ ] Proper heading structure

**Specific Expectations:**
- Keyboard behavior: [e.g. Tab should move to next lesson, Enter should play audio]
- Screen reader announcements: [e.g. Should announce lesson progress, pronunciation feedback]
- Visual requirements: [e.g. Focus indicators, high contrast mode support]

## 🎓 Learning Impact
**How does this affect language learning for users with disabilities?**

**Educational Barriers:**
- [ ] Cannot access pronunciation feedback
- [ ] Cannot participate in audio exercises
- [ ] Cannot see visual cultural content
- [ ] Cannot navigate lesson structure
- [ ] Cannot track learning progress
- [ ] Cannot participate in community discussions
- [ ] Cannot access cultural context

**Alternative Learning Needs:**
- Audio descriptions needed for: [e.g. Cultural images, lesson diagrams]
- Captions needed for: [e.g. Pronunciation examples, cultural videos]
- Keyboard shortcuts needed for: [e.g. Audio playback, lesson navigation]
- High contrast needed for: [e.g. Text overlays, progress indicators]

## 🌍 Cultural Accessibility
**Cultural content accessibility considerations:**

**Tahitian Language Accessibility:**
- [ ] Pronunciation guides for screen readers
- [ ] Visual representations of cultural concepts
- [ ] Audio descriptions of traditional practices
- [ ] Accessible cultural storytelling formats
- [ ] Inclusive representation in imagery

**Cultural Sensitivity:**
- [ ] Respectful accessibility accommodations
- [ ] Community input on accessible cultural content
- [ ] Traditional knowledge accessibility considerations

## 💡 Suggested Solutions
**How could this be made accessible?**

**Technical Solutions:**
- ARIA labels needed: [e.g. "Play pronunciation", "Lesson progress 3 of 10"]
- Keyboard shortcuts: [e.g. Spacebar to play/pause, Arrow keys for navigation]
- Alternative formats: [e.g. Text transcripts, Audio descriptions]
- Visual improvements: [e.g. Higher contrast, Larger text options]

**Content Solutions:**
- Alternative content formats: [e.g. Text-based cultural stories, Audio-described videos]
- Multiple learning modalities: [e.g. Visual, auditory, kinesthetic options]
- Customizable interface: [e.g. Font size, color themes, layout options]

## 📊 Impact Assessment
**How critical is this accessibility issue?**

**Severity:**
- [ ] 🔴 Critical - Completely blocks access to core functionality
- [ ] 🟠 High - Significantly impairs learning experience
- [ ] 🟡 Medium - Creates barriers but workarounds exist
- [ ] 🟢 Low - Minor accessibility enhancement

**User Impact:**
- Affected user groups: [e.g. Blind users, Deaf users, Motor impaired users]
- Learning features blocked: [e.g. All audio content, Visual exercises]
- Workarounds available: [e.g. Can use mobile app instead, Can ask for help]

## 🔧 Temporary Workarounds
**Are there any current workarounds?**

**Current Solutions:**
- Alternative access methods: [e.g. Using mobile app, Different browser]
- Assistive technology settings: [e.g. Custom screen reader settings]
- Third-party tools: [e.g. Browser extensions, External apps]

**Limitations of Workarounds:**
- What doesn't work: [e.g. Still can't access pronunciation feedback]
- Additional barriers: [e.g. Requires extra software, Complex setup]

## 📚 Accessibility Resources
**Relevant accessibility guidelines and resources:**

**Standards:**
- [ ] WCAG 2.1 AA guidelines
- [ ] Section 508 compliance
- [ ] ADA requirements
- [ ] Platform-specific guidelines (iOS, Android)

**Testing Tools:**
- Accessibility testing tools used: [e.g. axe DevTools, Lighthouse]
- Manual testing performed: [e.g. Keyboard navigation, Screen reader testing]

## ✅ Checklist
- [ ] I have identified the specific accessibility barrier
- [ ] I have provided assistive technology details
- [ ] I have described the expected accessible behavior
- [ ] I have considered the impact on language learning
- [ ] I have suggested potential solutions
- [ ] I have assessed the severity of the issue
- [ ] I have checked for existing workarounds
